title: Environmental Engineers
description: Research, design, plan, or perform engineering duties in the prevention, control, and remediation of environmental hazards using various engineering disciplines. Work may include waste treatment, site remediation, or pollution control technology.

tasks.text: Design, or supervise the design of, systems, processes, or equipment for control, management, or remediation of water, air, or soil quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess the existing or potential environmental impact of land use projects on air, water, or land.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collaborate with environmental scientists, planners, hazardous waste technicians, engineers, experts in law or business, or other specialists to address environmental problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise corporations or government agencies of procedures to follow in cleaning up contaminated sites to protect people and the environment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop proposed project objectives and targets and report to management on progress in attaining them.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor progress of environmental improvement programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare, review, or update environmental investigation or recommendation reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, maintain, or revise quality assurance documentation or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop site-specific health and safety protocols, such as spill contingency plans or methods for loading or transporting waste.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical support for environmental remediation or litigation projects, including remediation system design or determination of regulatory applicability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or present public briefings on the status of environmental engineering projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist in budget implementation, forecasts, or administration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate or manage environmental protection programs or projects, assigning or evaluating work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise industries or government agencies about environmental policies and standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain, update, or maintain plans, permits, or standard operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct installation or operation of environmental monitoring devices or supervise related data collection programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect industrial or municipal facilities or programs to evaluate operational effectiveness or ensure compliance with environmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Request bids from suppliers or consultants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform company employees or other interested parties of environmental issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve as liaison with federal, state, or local agencies or officials on issues pertaining to solid or hazardous waste program requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide administrative support for projects by collecting data, providing project documentation, training staff, or performing other general administrative duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide environmental engineering assistance in network analysis, regulatory analysis, or planning or reviewing database development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or present environmental compliance training or orientation sessions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide assistance with planning, quality assurance, safety inspection protocols, or sampling as part of a team conducting multimedia inspections at complex facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, or manage plans or programs related to conservation or management of natural resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare hazardous waste manifests or land disposal restriction notifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend professional conferences to share information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write reports or articles for Web sites or newsletters related to environmental engineering issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess, sort, characterize, or pack known or unknown materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
